releaseNotes:
1. TradFi now adds quick take-profit and stop-loss features, making trading decisions more confident and secure.

Gate is dedicated to providing you with a better user experience. You are welcome to submit feedback or tickets to give suggestions. Thank you for your support!
description:
Gate is a leading global cryptocurrency exchange offering access to over 4,500 digital assets, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and a wide range of emerging tokens. With over 13 years of industry experience, Gate provides secure trading trusted by over 51 million users worldwide.

Extensive assets, ready to buy and trade on-demand.
BTC, ETH, XRP, HBAR, MOODENG, DOGE, ADA, PEPE, SOL, SUI, LINK, DOT, KAS,  CRV, ORDI, TAO, LTC, SHIB, JASMY, ENA, SEI, AVAX, RATS, XLM,  APEPE, XRPL, POL, RSR, FIL, ALGO, CFX, BCH, ETC, SUNDOG, KAIA, PNUT, BNB, NEAR,  BAN,  BIGTIME, TOKEN, VIRTUAL, TIA, SATS, BOME, UNI, OM and more than 4,500 other digital assets.

A comprehensive cryptocurrency exchange offering top-tier assets, all in one place.
• Spot Trading:
 Supports digital assets, leveraged tokens, BRC20, AI, Meme, RWA, DePin, ETH2.0 staking, ETFs, 5x leveraged ETFs, Layer 2, platform tokens, DeFi, and a wide range of ecosystem assets.
• Futures:
 Futures: Perpetuals, delivery contracts and more — covering 100+ markets with 0 maker fees. Enjoy points redemption and various rewards.
• Alpha:
Gate Alpha provides one-click access to comprehensive token data, supports early token trading and tracking of trending assets. Earn Alpha points by holding and trading, participate in token airdrops, TGE subscriptions, and limited-time events.
• Web3:
 Access to Web3 ecosystem entry points including Gate Layer, Gate Perp DEX, Gate Fun, Meme Go, Web3 Launchpad and more, helping users explore the on-chain world.
• Gate Card
Covers 200+ countries and regions worldwide, supporting multiple online and offline payment methods.
• Gate AI Ecosystem
Integrates AI trading assistants, Agent infrastructure, native AI Agent platforms, and AI aggregation platforms.
• Launchpool:
 Stake GT, USDT, ETH, and other major assets to earn new project tokens. Hourly reward distribution, flexible participation and withdrawal.
• CandyDrop:
 Complete simple tasks to earn "candies" and join lucky draws for new token airdrops. Zero barrier and huge rewards.
• HODLer:
 HODLer: Hold just 1 GT to automatically receive airdrops from multiple projects, with no lockups or extra actions required. Simply hold, and earn.
• Launchpad:
 Participate in early high-quality project token sales and gain potential returns. Strict project screening ensures quality and fairness.
• Earn:
 Gate offers a variety of wealth management products, including including Simple Earn, Auto-Invest, Dual Investment, Quant Funds, Crypto Loan, and more. Simple, flexible, and aimed at helping users grow their assets.
• Trading Bots:
 Supports a wide range of bot strategies including Spot Grid, Futures Grid, Martingale Bot, Smart Rebalance Bot, Arbitrage Bot, Inter-Exchange Arbitrage Bot, Infinite Grid, Margin Grid, CTA-Expert Bot, Signal Bot, and more.
• Copy Trading:
 Follow top traders, copy trades in one click, and share profits. Enables rapid execution of trading strategies with an overall position synchronization rate of up to 99.99%.
• Community:
 The latest from the industry, with live discussions and livestreams with trending sections, helping you stay on top of market developments and capture opportunities.

- First exchange to commit to 100% Proof of Reserves
 Gate's reserves cover over 500 digital assets, leveraging Merkle trees and zero-knowledge proof technology to fully secure user funds, with an excess reserve exceeding $7.884 billion.

- Leading experience:
 Global customer support with 24/7 service, offering peace-of-mind no matter where you trade. Got questions? Get in touch with us at support@gate.com.

Follow Gate on social media to stay ahead

Telegram: https://t.me/gate_official_bot/
